```liquid
.cp-sticky-cta__form { background: var(--bz-orange); color: var(--bz-navy); }
.cp-sticky-cta svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; fill: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* RESPONSIVE TABLET */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .cp-help-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .cp-trust-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .cp-faq-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .cp-form-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 36px; }
  .cp-hero__inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 36px; }
}

/* RESPONSIVE MOBILE */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .cp-hero { padding: 48px 16px 56px; }
  .cp-hero h1 { font-size: 28px; }
  .cp-hero__sub { font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .cp-hero__cta { flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .cp-hero__cta .cp-btn { width: 100%; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 20px; }
  .cp-hero__trust { flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .cp-hero__box { padding: 22px 18px; }
  .cp-hero__contact-item { padding: 12px 14px; }
  .cp-section { padding: 48px 0; }
  .cp-form-section { padding: 48px 0; }
  .cp-faq-section { padding: 48px 0; }
  .cp-help-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 14px; }
  .cp-help-card { padding: 22px 18px; }
  .cp-foto-tipp { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; padding: 28px 20px; gap: 18px; }
  .cp-foto-tipp__cta { width: 100%; }
  .cp-foto-tipp__cta .cp-btn { width: 100%; }
  .cp-form-wrapper { padding: 24px 18px; }
  .cp-form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 14px; }
  .cp-form-full { grid-column: 1; }
  .cp-field input, .cp-field select, .cp-field textarea { font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; }
  .cp-field textarea { min-height: 100px; }
  .cp-btn--lg { font-size: 15px; padding: 16px 20px; }
  .cp-trust-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .cp-trust-badges { gap: 12px; }
  .cp-trust-badge { font-size: 12px; padding: 9px 14px; }
  .cp-faq-item__q { font-size: 14px; padding: 16px 16px; }
  .cp-faq-item__a { padding: 0 16px 16px; font-size: 13.5px; }
  .cp-form-sidebar-card { padding: 22px 18px; }
  .cp-hours-row { font-size: 12.5px; }
  .cp-sticky-cta { display: flex; }
  .cp-contact-end { padding-bottom: 80px; }
  .cp-section-title { font-size: 22px; }
}

/* VERY SMALL */
@media (max-width: 380px) {
  .cp-hero h1 { font-size: 24px; }
  .cp-wrap { padding: 0 14px; }
  .cp-form-wrapper { padding: 20px 14px; }
  .cp-hero__box { padding: 18px 14px; }
}
</style>

{% assign phone_raw = section.settings.phone | strip %}
{% assign phone_href = phone_raw | remove: ' ' | remove: '(' | remove: ')' | remove: '-' | remove: '/' %}
{% assign email_raw = section.settings.email | strip %}
{% assign whatsapp_raw = section.settings.whatsapp | strip %}

<div class="cp">

  <!-- 1. HERO -->
  <section class="cp-hero">
    <div class="cp-hero__inner">
      <div class="cp-hero__left">
        <div class="cp-hero__kicker">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5zM2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/></svg>
          PV Dachziegel Beratung und Kontakt
        </div>
        <h1>Fragen zu <span>Blechziegeln?</span><br>Wir helfen schnell und direkt.</h1>
        <p class="cp-hero__sub">
          Ob Produktauswahl, Dachtyp-Beratung oder technische Details -
          unser Team gibt klare Antworten.
          Keine Warteschleife. Kein Formular-Dschungel.
        </p>
        <div class="cp-hero__cta">
          <a href="#cp-formular" class="cp-btn cp-btn--primary">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>
            Anfrage senden
          </a>
          <a href="tel:{{ phone_href }}" class="cp-btn cp-btn--outline">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6.6 10.8c1.4 2.8 3.8 5.1 6.6 6.6l2.2-2.2c.3-.3.7-.4 1-.2 1.1.4 2.3.6 3.6.6.6 0 1 .4 1 1V20c0 .6-.4 1-1 1-9.4 0-17-7.6-17-17 0-.6.4-1 1-1h3.5c.6 0 1 .4 1 1 0 1.3.2 2.5.6 3.6.1.3 0 .7-.2 1L6.6 10.8z"/></svg>
            Jetzt anrufen
          </a>
        </div>
        <div class="cp-hero__trust">
          <div class="cp-hero__trust-item">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg>
            Antwort innerhalb 24h
          </div>
          <div class="cp-hero__trust-item">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg>
            Direkt vom Fachbetrieb
          </div>
          <div class="cp-hero__trust-item">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg>
            Kostenlose Beratung
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="cp-hero__right">
        <div class="cp-hero__box">
          <div class="cp-hero__box-title">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17 12h-5v5h5v-5zM16 1v2H8V1H6v2H5c-1.11 0-1.99.9-1.99 2L3 19c0 1.1.89 2 2 2h14c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V5c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2h-1V1h-2zm3 18H5V8h14v11z"/></svg>
            Direkt Kontakt aufnehmen
          </div>

          <div class="cp-hero__contact-list">
            <a href="tel:{{ phone_href }}" class="cp-hero__contact-item">
              <div class="cp-hero__contact-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6.6 10.8c1.4 2.8 3.8 5.1 6.6 6.6l2.2-2.2c.3-.3.7-.4 1-.2 1.1.4 2.3.6 3.6.6.6 0 1 .4 1 1V20c0 .6-.4 1-1 1-9.4 0-17-7.6-17-17 0-.6.4-1 1-1h3.5c.6 0 1 .4 1 1 0 1.3.2 2.5.6 3.6.1.3 0 .7-.2 1L6.6 10.8z"/></svg>
              </div>
              <div class="cp-hero__contact-info">
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-label">Telefon</div>
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-value">{{ phone_raw }}</div>
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-note">Mo - Fr, 8:00 - 17:00 Uhr</div>
              </div>
            </a>

            <a href="mailto:{{ email_raw }}" class="cp-hero__contact-item">
              <div class="cp-hero__contact-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>
              </div>
              <div class="cp-hero__contact-info">
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-label">E-Mail</div>
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-value">{{ email_raw }}</div>
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-note">Jederzeit erreichbar</div>
              </div>
            </a>

            <a href="https://wa.me/{{ whatsapp_raw }}" class="cp-hero__contact-item">
              <div class="cp-hero__contact-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
              </div>
              <div class="cp-hero__contact-info">
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-label">WhatsApp</div>
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-value">Direkt schreiben</div>
                <div class="cp-hero__contact-note">Foto einfach mitschicken</div>
              </div>
            </a>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-hero__response">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg>
            Antwortzeit: innerhalb von 24h (Werktage)
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- 2. SCHNELLE HILFE -->
  <section class="cp-section cp-section--white">
    <div class="cp-wrap">
      <span class="cp-section-label">So helfen wir dir</span>
      <h2 class="cp-section-title">Was ist dein Anliegen?</h2>
      <p class="cp-section-sub">
        Waehle direkt aus, womit wir dir weiterhelfen koennen -
        oder nutze das Formular weiter unten fuer individuelle Anfragen.
      </p>

      <div class="cp-help-grid">
        <div class="cp-help-card" onclick="document.getElementById('cp-formular').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
          <div class="cp-help-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 3H5c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v14c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h14c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V5c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm-7 3c1.93 0 3.5 1.57 3.5 3.5S13.93 13 12 13s-3.5-1.57-3.5-3.5S10.07 6 12 6zm7 13H5v-.23c0-.62.28-1.2.76-1.58C7.47 15.82 9.64 15 12 15s4.53.82 6.24 2.19c.48.38.76.97.76 1.58V19z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__title">Produktauswahl und Beratung</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__desc">Welcher Blechziegel passt zu meinem Dach? Wir helfen bei der Auswahl nach Ziegeltyp, Farbe und Einbausituation.</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__link">Anfrage starten <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.59 16.59L13.17 12 8.59 7.41 10 6l6 6-6 6-1.41-1.41z"/></svg></div>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-help-card" onclick="document.getElementById('cp-formular').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
          <div class="cp-help-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__title">Dachtyp-Pruefung</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__desc">Aktuell verfuegbar fuer Frankfurter Pfanne. Schnell klaeren, ob dein Dachziegel kompatibel ist - per Foto oder Typ-Angabe.</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__link">Kompatibilitaet pruefen <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.59 16.59L13.17 12 8.59 7.41 10 6l6 6-6 6-1.41-1.41z"/></svg></div>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-help-card" onclick="document.getElementById('cp-formular').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
          <div class="cp-help-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm1 15h-2v-6h2v6zm0-8h-2V7h2v2z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__title">Technische Fragen</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__desc">Montage, Dichtigkeit, Kabelfuehrung, Statik - fuer alle technischen Details geben wir klare, praxisnahe Antworten.</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__link">Frage stellen <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.59 16.59L13.17 12 8.59 7.41 10 6l6 6-6 6-1.41-1.41z"/></svg></div>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-help-card" onclick="document.getElementById('cp-formular').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
          <div class="cp-help-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 3H5c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v14c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h14c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V5c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm-5 14H7v-2h7v2zm3-4H7v-2h10v2zm0-4H7V7h10v2z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__title">Projektanfragen und Grossmengen</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__desc">Dachdecker, PV-Installateure oder Grossprojekte: Mengenangebote, Sonderkonditionen und Lieferplanung auf Anfrage.</div>
          <div class="cp-help-card__link">Projekt anfragen <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.59 16.59L13.17 12 8.59 7.41 10 6l6 6-6 6-1.41-1.41z"/></svg></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="cp-foto-tipp">
        <div class="cp-foto-tipp__icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 5h-3.17L15 3H9L7.17 5H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V7c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm-8 13c-2.76 0-5-2.24-5-5s2.24-5 5-5 5 2.24 5 5-2.24 5-5 5zm0-8c-1.65 0-3 1.35-3 3s1.35 3 3 3 3-1.35 3-3-1.35-3-3-3z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="cp-foto-tipp__body">
          <div class="cp-foto-tipp__label">Schneller Tipp</div>
          <div class="cp-foto-tipp__title">Foto vom Dach mitschicken = schnellere Beratung</div>
          <div class="cp-foto-tipp__desc">Ein Foto deines Dachziegels reicht oft aus, um sofort die richtige Empfehlung zu geben. Per WhatsApp oder im Formular beschrieben.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cp-foto-tipp__cta">
          <a href="https://wa.me/{{ whatsapp_raw }}" class="cp-btn cp-btn--primary">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
            Foto per WhatsApp senden
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- 3. KONTAKTFORMULAR + SIDEBAR -->
  <section class="cp-form-section cp-section--gray" id="cp-formular">
    <div class="cp-wrap">
      <div class="cp-form-layout">
        <div>
          <span class="cp-section-label">Direktanfrage</span>
          <h2 class="cp-section-title">Schreib uns - wir melden uns schnell</h2>
          <p class="cp-section-sub">Kein langes Formular. Nur die Infos, die wir wirklich brauchen.</p>

          <div class="cp-form-wrapper">
            <div class="cp-form-title">Anfrage senden</div>
            <div class="cp-form-subtitle">Name, E-Mail und Nachricht sind erforderlich. Firma und Telefon sind optional.</div>

            {% form 'contact', id: 'BlechziegelContactForm' %}
              {% if form.posted_successfully? %}
                <div class="cp-form-success" style="display:flex" role="status" tabindex="-1">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg>
                  Danke! Deine Anfrage ist bei uns eingegangen. Du erhaeltst innerhalb von 24h eine Antwort.
                </div>
              {% endif %}

              {% if form.errors %}
                <div class="cp-form-errors" role="alert">
                  {{ form.errors | default_errors }}
                </div>
              {% endif %}

              <input type="hidden" name="contact[body]" id="ContactBodyCompiled">

              <div class="cp-form-grid">
                <div class="cp-field">
                  <label for="ContactName">Name <span style="color:#dc2626">*</span></label>
                  <input type="text" id="ContactName" name="contact[name]" value="{{ form.name }}" placeholder="Dein Name" required autocomplete="name">
                </div>

                <div class="cp-field">
                  <label for="ContactFirma">Firma <span class="cp-optional">(optional)</span></label>
                  <input type="text" id="ContactFirma" placeholder="Dachdeckerei Mustermann" autocomplete="organization">
                </div>

                <div class="cp-field">
                  <label for="ContactEmail">E-Mail <span style="color:#dc2626">*</span></label>
                  <input type="email" id="ContactEmail" name="contact[email]" value="{{ form.email }}" placeholder="deine@email.de" required autocomplete="email" inputmode="email">
                </div>

                <div class="cp-field">
                  <label for="ContactTelefon">Telefon <span class="cp-optional">(optional)</span></label>
                  <input type="tel" id="ContactTelefon" placeholder="0911 / 000 000" autocomplete="tel" inputmode="tel">
                </div>

                <div class="cp-field cp-form-full">
                  <label for="ContactZiegeltyp">Worum geht es?</label>
                  <select id="ContactZiegeltyp">
                    <option value="">- Bitte waehlen -</option>
                    <optgroup label="Produktanfragen">
                      <option value="Blechziegel - Frankfurter Pfanne">Blechziegel - Frankfurter Pfanne</option>
                      <option value="Blechziegel - anderer Ziegeltyp">Blechziegel - anderer Ziegeltyp (Anfrage)</option>
                      <option value="Farb- oder Variantenauswahl">Farb- oder Variantenauswahl</option>
                    </optgroup>
                    <optgroup label="Technische Beratung">
                      <option value="Montagefrage / Einbau">Montagefrage / Einbau</option>
                      <option value="Dichtigkeit / Wetterschutz">Dichtigkeit / Wetterschutz</option>
                      <option value="Kabelfuehrung / PV-Anschluss">Kabelfuehrung / PV-Anschluss</option>
                      <option value="Dachziegel-Kompatibilitaet pruefen">Dachziegel-Kompatibilitaet pruefen</option>
                    </optgroup>
                    <optgroup label="Projektanfragen">
                      <option value="Grossmengen / Haendleranfrage">Grossmengen / Haendleranfrage</option>
                      <option value="Ich bin Dachdecker / Betrieb">Ich bin Dachdecker / Betrieb</option>
                      <option value="Ich bin PV-Installateur">Ich bin PV-Installateur</option>
                    </optgroup>
                    <optgroup label="Sonstiges">
                      <option value="Frage zu Lieferung / Versand">Frage zu Lieferung / Versand</option>
                      <option value="Reklamation / Ruecksendung">Reklamation / Ruecksendung</option>
                      <option value="Sonstiges">Sonstiges</option>
                    </optgroup>
                  </select>
                </div>

                <div class="cp-field cp-form-full">
                  <label for="ContactMessageText">Deine Nachricht <span style="color:#dc2626">*</span></label>
                  <textarea id="ContactMessageText" placeholder="Beschreibe kurz dein Anliegen. Je mehr Infos, desto schneller koennen wir helfen. Ein Foto per WhatsApp oder E-Mail ist oft noch besser!" rows="5" required>{{ form.body }}</textarea>
                </div>

                <div class="cp-form-full">
                  <label class="cp-form-consent">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="ContactConsent" required>
                    <span>Ich stimme zu, dass meine Daten zur Bearbeitung meiner Anfrage verwendet werden. Infos zum Datenschutz: <a href="/pages/datenschutz">Datenschutzerklaerung</a>.</span>
                  </label>
                </div>

                <div class="cp-form-full">
                  <button type="submit" class="cp-btn cp-btn--primary cp-btn--lg">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M2.01 21L23 12 2.01 3 2 10l15 2-15 2z"/></svg>
                    Anfrage jetzt senden
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            {% endform %}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-form-sidebar">
          <div class="cp-form-sidebar-card cp-form-sidebar-card--navy">
            <div class="cp-sidebar-card-label">Direktkontakt</div>
            <div class="cp-sidebar-card-title">Lieber direkt sprechen?</div>

            <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-list">
              <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-item">
                <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6.6 10.8c1.4 2.8 3.8 5.1 6.6 6.6l2.2-2.2c.3-.3.7-.4 1-.2 1.1.4 2.3.6 3.6.6.6 0 1 .4 1 1V20c0 .6-.4 1-1 1-9.4 0-17-7.6-17-17 0-.6.4-1 1-1h3.5c.6 0 1 .4 1 1 0 1.3.2 2.5.6 3.6.1.3 0 .7-.2 1L6.6 10.8z"/></svg></div>
                <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-info">
                  <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-label">Telefon</div>
                  <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-value"><a href="tel:{{ phone_href }}">{{ phone_raw }}</a></div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-item">
                <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg></div>
                <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-info">
                  <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-label">E-Mail</div>
                  <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-value"><a href="mailto:{{ email_raw }}">{{ email_raw }}</a></div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-item">
                <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg></div>
                <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-info">
                  <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-label">WhatsApp</div>
                  <div class="cp-sidebar-contact-value"><a href="https://wa.me/{{ whatsapp_raw }}">Direkt schreiben</a></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="cp-sidebar-response">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg>
              Antwort innerhalb 24h
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-form-sidebar-card">
            <div class="cp-sidebar-card-label">Erreichbarkeit</div>
            <div class="cp-sidebar-card-title">Wann sind wir da?</div>
            <div class="cp-hours">
              <div class="cp-hours-row"><span class="cp-hours-day">Mo - Fr</span><span class="cp-hours-time">08:00 - 17:00 Uhr</span></div>
              <div class="cp-hours-row"><span class="cp-hours-day">Samstag</span><span class="cp-hours-time">Nach Vereinbarung</span></div>
              <div class="cp-hours-row"><span class="cp-hours-day">Sonntag</span><span class="cp-hours-time">Geschlossen</span></div>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top:16px; padding:12px 14px; background:var(--bz-orange-bg); border-radius:6px; font-size:13px; color:var(--bz-navy); font-weight:600; line-height:1.5;">
              E-Mail- und WhatsApp-Anfragen werden auch ausserhalb der Buerozeiten entgegengenommen.
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-form-sidebar-card">
            <div class="cp-sidebar-card-label">Standort</div>
            <div class="cp-sidebar-card-title">Unser Standort</div>
            <div style="font-size:14px; color:var(--bz-text-light); line-height:1.7;">
              Blechziegel GmbH<br>Allersberger Strasse 185<br>90461 Nuernberg
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- 5. VERTRAUENSBEREICH -->
  <section class="cp-section cp-section--navy">
    <div class="cp-wrap">
      <div style="text-align:center; max-width:640px; margin:0 auto 8px;">
        <span class="cp-section-label">Warum Blechziegel.de?</span>
        <h2 class="cp-section-title" style="color:var(--bz-white);">Erfahrung trifft Praxisnaehe</h2>
        <p class="cp-section-sub" style="margin:0 auto 0; text-align:center;">
          Kein Callcenter. Keine Standardantworten. Direkt vom Fachbetrieb, der die Produkte kennt und versteht.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="cp-trust-grid">
        <div class="cp-trust-card">
          <div class="cp-trust-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__num">4,9&#9733;</div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__title">Trusted Shops Bewertung</div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__desc">Gepruefte Kundenbewertungen. Hohe Zufriedenheit bei Dachdeckern und Privatkunden.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-trust-card">
          <div class="cp-trust-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__num">Made in DE</div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__title">Produktion in Deutschland</div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__desc">Aluminium-Blechziegel, pulverbeschichtet, gefertigt nach deutschem Qualitaetsstandard.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-trust-card">
          <div class="cp-trust-card__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 8h-3V4H3c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v11h2c0 1.66 1.34 3 3 3s3-1.34 3-3h6c0 1.66 1.34 3 3 3s3-1.34 3-3h2v-5l-3-4zm-.5 1.5l1.96 2.5H17V9.5h2.5zM6 18c-.55 0-1-.45-1-1s.45-1 1-1 1 .45 1 1-.45 1-1 1zm2.22-3c-.55-.61-1.33-1-2.22-1s-1.67.39-2.22 1H3V6h12v9H8.22zM18 18c-.55 0-1-.45-1-1s.45-1 1-1 1 .45 1 1-.45 1-1 1z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__num">1-3 Tage</div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__title">Lieferzeit innerhalb DE</div>
          <div class="cp-trust-card__desc">Per DHL. Ab 100 Euro kostenlos. Zuverlaessig, schnell, direkt auf die Baustelle.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="cp-trust-badges">
        <div class="cp-trust-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4z"/></svg> SSL gesichert</div>
        <div class="cp-trust-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg> Kostenloser Versand ab 100 Euro</div>
        <div class="cp-trust-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11"/></svg> Kein Kaufzwang bei Beratung</div>
        <div class="cp-trust-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-2 14.5v-9l6 4.5-6 4.5z"/></svg> Vorkasse, Rechnung, SEPA</div>
        <div class="cp-trust-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17 12h-5v5h5v-5zM16 1v2H8V1H6v2H5c-1.11 0-1.99.9-1.99 2L3 19c0 1.1.89 2 2 2h14c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V5c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2h-1V1h-2zm3 18H5V8h14v11z"/></svg> Handwerker-fokussierte Beratung</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- 6. FAQ -->
  <section class="cp-faq-section cp-contact-end">
    <div class="cp-wrap">
      <div class="cp-faq-layout">
        <div>
          <span class="cp-section-label">Haeufige Fragen</span>
          <h2 class="cp-section-title">Schnelle Antworten</h2>
          <p class="cp-section-sub">Die haeufigsten Fragen, die wir von Dachdeckern und PV-Monteuren bekommen - direkt beantwortet.</p>
          <a href="#cp-formular" class="cp-btn cp-btn--navy" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="width:15px;height:15px;fill:currentColor"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>
            Andere Frage stellen
          </a>
        </div>

        <div class="cp-faq-list">
          <div class="cp-faq-item">
            <div class="cp-faq-item__q" onclick="bzFaqToggle(this)">
              Wie finde ich den richtigen Blechziegel fuer mein Dach?
              <div class="cp-faq-item__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/></svg></div>
            </div>
            <div class="cp-faq-item__a">Aktuell bieten wir Blechziegel speziell fuer die <strong>Frankfurter Pfanne</strong> an. Schau auf deinen Dachziegel: Steht dort der Typ oder hast du ein Foto? Schick es uns per WhatsApp oder E-Mail - wir sagen dir schnell, ob es passt.</div>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-faq-item">
            <div class="cp-faq-item__q" onclick="bzFaqToggle(this)">
              Welche Infos braucht ihr fuer eine Beratung?
              <div class="cp-faq-item__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/></svg></div>
            </div>
            <div class="cp-faq-item__a">Im Idealfall: <strong>Ziegeltyp</strong>, <strong>Farbe des Dachs</strong> und <strong>Anzahl der benoetigten Durchfuehrungen</strong>. Ein Foto ist besser als jede Beschreibung. Schick es einfach mit - das reicht oft fuer eine praezise Empfehlung.</div>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-faq-item">
            <div class="cp-faq-item__q" onclick="bzFaqToggle(this)">
              Wie schnell bekomme ich eine Antwort?
              <div class="cp-faq-item__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/></svg></div>
            </div>
            <div class="cp-faq-item__a">Wir antworten innerhalb von <strong>24 Stunden</strong> an Werktagen. Telefon-Anfragen werden waehrend der Buerozeiten beantwortet. WhatsApp-Nachrichten oft noch schneller.</div>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-faq-item">
            <div class="cp-faq-item__q" onclick="bzFaqToggle(this)">
              Ich bin Dachdecker oder Betrieb - gibt es Sonderkonditionen?
              <div class="cp-faq-item__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/></svg></div>
            </div>
            <div class="cp-faq-item__a">Ja. Fuer Handwerksbetriebe und regelmaessige Abnehmer bieten wir Mengenrabatte, Rechnungskauf und Lieferplanung an. Einfach im Formular angeben - wir melden uns.</div>
          </div>

          <div class="cp-faq-item">
            <div class="cp-faq-item__q" onclick="bzFaqToggle(this)">
              Ist der Blechziegel wirklich wasserdicht und langlebig?
              <div class="cp-faq-item__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/></svg></div>
            </div>
            <div class="cp-faq-item__a">Ja. Der Blechziegel ist passgenau auf den jeweiligen Ziegeltyp gefertigt und dichtet die Oeffnung vollstaendig ab. Material: Aluminium, pulverbeschichtet, korrosionsbestaendig. Herstellung in Deutschland.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- STICKY CTA -->
  <div class="cp-sticky-cta" id="cp-sticky">
    <a href="tel:{{ phone_href }}" class="cp-sticky-cta__tel">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6.6 10.8c1.4 2.8 3.8 5.1 6.6 6.6l2.2-2.2c.3-.3.7-.4 1-.2 1.1.4 2.3.6 3.6.6.6 0 1 .4 1 1V20c0 .6-.4 1-1 1-9.4 0-17-7.6-17-17 0-.6.4-1 1-1h3.5c.6 0 1 .4 1 1 0 1.3.2 2.5.6 3.6.1.3 0 .7-.2 1L6.6 10.8z"/></svg>
      Anrufen
    </a>
    <a href="#cp-formular" class="cp-sticky-cta__form">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>
      Anfrage senden
    </a>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function bzFaqToggle(el) {
  var item = el.closest('.cp-faq-item');
  var isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.cp-faq-item.open').forEach(function(i) {
    i.classList.remove('open');
  });
  if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
}

(function() {
  var sticky = document.getElementById('cp-sticky');
  var formular = document.getElementById('cp-formular');
  if (!sticky || !formular) return;

  function onScroll() {
    var rect = formular.getBoundingClientRect();
    var inView = rect.top < window.innerHeight && rect.bottom > 0;
    sticky.style.opacity = inView ? '0' : '1';
    sticky.style.pointerEvents = inView ? 'none' : 'auto';
  }

  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  onScroll();
})();

document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(a) {
  a.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var href = this.getAttribute('href');
    if (!href || href === '#') return;

    var target = document.querySelector(href);
    if (target) {
      e.preventDefault();
      var top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - 20;
      window.scrollTo({ top: top, behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
  });
});

(function() {
  var form = document.getElementById('BlechziegelContactForm');
  if (!form) return;

  form.addEventListener('submit', function() {
    var firma = document.getElementById('ContactFirma') ? document.getElementById('ContactFirma').value.trim() : '';
    var telefon = document.getElementById('ContactTelefon') ? document.getElementById('ContactTelefon').value.trim() : '';
    var thema = document.getElementById('ContactZiegeltyp') ? document.getElementById('ContactZiegeltyp').value.trim() : '';
    var message = document.getElementById('ContactMessageText') ? document.getElementById('ContactMessageText').value.trim() : '';
    var target = document.getElementById('ContactBodyCompiled');

    var compiled = '';
    if (firma) compiled += 'Firma: ' + firma + '\n';
    if (telefon) compiled += 'Telefon: ' + telefon + '\n';
    if (thema) compiled += 'Thema: ' + thema + '\n';
    compiled += '\nNachricht:\n' + message;

    if (target) target.value = compiled;
  });
})();
</script>

{% schema %}
{
  "name": "Kontaktseite",
  "tag": "section",
  "class": "cp-section-wrapper",
  "settings": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Kontaktdaten"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "phone",
      "label": "Telefonnummer",
      "default": "+49 (0) 911 / 000 000"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "email",
      "label": "E-Mail-Adresse",
      "default": "web@blechziegel.de"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "whatsapp",
      "label": "WhatsApp-Nummer (international, ohne +)",
      "default": "49911000000"
    }
  ],
  "presets": [
    {
      "name": "Kontaktseite - Blechziegel"
    }
  ]
}
{% endschema %}
```

## sections/_blocks.liquid

```liquid


{% capture children %}
  {% content_for 'blocks' %}
{% endcapture %}

{% render 'section', section: section, children: children %}

{% schema %}
{
  "name": "t:names.section",
  "class": "section-wrapper",
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "@theme"
    },
    {
      "type": "@app"
    },
    {
      "type": "_divider"
    }
  ],
  "settings": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.layout"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "content_direction",
      "label": "t:settings.direction",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "column",
          "label": "t:options.vertical"
        },
        {
          "value": "row",
          "label": "t:options.horizontal"
        }
      ],
      "default": "column"
    },
    {
      "type": "checkbox",
      "id": "vertical_on_mobile",
      "label": "t:settings.vertical_on_mobile",
      "default": true,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.content_direction == 'row' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "horizontal_alignment",
      "label": "t:settings.alignment",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "flex-start",
          "label": "t:options.left"
        },
        {
          "value": "center",
          "label": "t:options.center"
        },
        {
          "value": "flex-end",
          "label": "t:options.right"
        },
        {
          "value": "space-between",
          "label": "t:options.space_between"
        }
      ],
      "default": "flex-start",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.content_direction == 'row' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "vertical_alignment",
      "label": "t:settings.position",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "flex-start",
          "label": "t:options.top"
        },
        {
          "value": "center",
          "label": "t:options.center"
        },
        {
          "value": "flex-end",
          "label": "t:options.bottom"
        }
      ],
      "default": "center",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.content_direction == 'row' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "checkbox",
      "id": "align_baseline",
      "label": "t:settings.align_baseline",
      "default": false,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.vertical_alignment == 'flex-end' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "horizontal_alignment_flex_direction_column",
      "label": "t:settings.alignment",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "flex-start",
          "label": "t:options.left"
        },
        {
          "value": "center",
          "label": "t:options.center"
        },
        {
          "value": "flex-end",
          "label": "t:options.right"
        }
      ],
      "default": "flex-start",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.content_direction != 'row' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "vertical_alignment_flex_direction_column",
      "label": "t:settings.position",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "flex-start",
          "label": "t:options.top"
        },
        {
          "value": "center",
          "label": "t:options.center"
        },
        {
          "value": "flex-end",
          "label": "t:options.bottom"
        },
        {
          "value": "space-between",
          "label": "t:options.space_between"
        }
      ],
      "default": "center",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.content_direction == 'column' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "gap",
      "label": "t:settings.gap",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 12
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.size"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "section_width",
      "label": "t:settings.width",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "page-width",
          "label": "t:options.page"
        },
        {
          "value": "full-width",
          "label": "t:options.full"
        }
      ],
      "default": "page-width"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "section_height",
      "label": "t:settings.height",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "",
          "label": "t:options.auto"
        },
        {
          "value": "small",
          "label": "t:options.small"
        },
        {
          "value": "medium",
          "label": "t:options.medium"
        },
        {
          "value": "large",
          "label": "t:options.large"
        },
        {
          "value": "full-screen",
          "label": "t:options.full_screen"
        },
        {
          "value": "custom",
          "label": "t:options.custom"
        }
      ],
      "default": ""
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "section_height_custom",
      "label": "t:settings.custom_height",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "default": 50,
      "unit": "%",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.section_height == 'custom' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.appearance"
    },
    {
      "type": "color_scheme",
      "id": "color_scheme",
      "label": "t:settings.color_scheme",
      "default": "scheme-1"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "background_media",
      "label": "t:settings.background_media",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "none",
          "label": "t:options.none"
        },
        {
          "value": "image",
          "label": "t:options.image"
        },
        {
          "value": "video",
          "label": "t:options.video"
        }
      ],
      "default": "none"
    },
    {
      "type": "video",
      "id": "video",
      "label": "t:settings.video",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.background_media == 'video' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "video_position",
      "label": "t:settings.video_position",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "cover",
          "label": "t:options.cover"
        },
        {
          "value": "contain",
          "label": "t:options.contain"
        }
      ],
      "default": "cover",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.background_media == 'video' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "image_picker",
      "id": "background_image",
      "label": "t:settings.image",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.background_media == 'image' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "background_image_position",
      "label": "t:settings.image_position",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "cover",
          "label": "t:options.cover"
        },
        {
          "value": "fit",
          "label": "t:options.fit"
        }
      ],
      "default": "cover",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.background_media == 'image' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "border",
      "label": "t:settings.borders",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "none",
          "label": "t:options.none"
        },
        {
          "value": "solid",
          "label": "t:options.solid"
        }
      ],
      "default": "none"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "border_width",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 10,
      "step": 0.5,
      "unit": "px",
      "label": "t:settings.border_width",
      "default": 1,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.border != 'none' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "border_opacity",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "%",
      "label": "t:settings.border_opacity",
      "default": 100,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.border != 'none' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "border_radius",
      "label": "t:settings.border_radius",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "checkbox",
      "id": "toggle_overlay",
      "label": "t:settings.background_overlay"
    },
    {
      "type": "color",
      "id": "overlay_color",
      "label": "t:settings.overlay_color",
      "alpha": true,
      "default": "#00000026",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.toggle_overlay }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "overlay_style",
      "label": "t:settings.overlay_style",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "solid",
          "label": "t:options.solid"
        },
        {
          "value": "gradient",
          "label": "t:options.gradient"
        }
      ],
      "default": "solid",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.toggle_overlay }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "gradient_direction",
      "label": "t:settings.gradient_direction",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "to top",
          "label": "t:options.up"
        },
        {
          "value": "to bottom",
          "label": "t:options.down"
        }
      ],
      "default": "to top",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.toggle_overlay and section.settings.overlay_style == 'gradient' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.padding"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-start",
      "label": "t:settings.top",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-end",
      "label": "t:settings.bottom",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    }
  ],
  "presets": [
    {
      "name": "t:names.custom_section",
      "category": "t:categories.layout"
    }
  ]
}
{% endschema %}

```

## sections/carousel.liquid

```liquid


<div class="section-background color-{{ section.settings.color_scheme }}"></div>
<div
  class="
    section
    section--{{ section.settings.section_width }}
    color-{{ section.settings.color_scheme }}
    section-carousel
    spacing-style
    gap-style
  "
  style="
    {% render 'spacing-style', settings: section.settings %}
    {% render 'gap-style', value: 12 %}
  "
  data-testid="carousel-section"
>
  {% content_for 'block', type: 'group', id: 'static-header' %}

  {% content_for 'block', type: '_carousel-content', id: 'static-carousel-content', closest.product: null %}
</div>

{% schema %}
{
  "name": "t:names.carousel",
  "disabled_on": {
    "groups": ["header", "footer"]
  },
  "settings": [
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "columns",
      "label": "t:settings.columns",
      "min": 1,
      "max": 8,
      "step": 1,
      "default": 4
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "mobile_columns",
      "label": "t:settings.mobile_columns",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "1",
          "label": "t:options.one_number"
        },
        {
          "value": "2",
          "label": "t:options.two_number"
        }
      ],
      "default": "1"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "section_width",
      "label": "t:settings.width",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "page-width",
          "label": "t:options.page"
        },
        {
          "value": "full-width",
          "label": "t:options.full"
        }
      ],
      "default": "page-width"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "columns_gap",
      "label": "t:settings.horizontal_gap",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 8
    },
    {
      "type": "color_scheme",
      "id": "color_scheme",
      "label": "t:settings.color_scheme",
      "default": "scheme-1"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.navigation"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "icons_style",
      "label": "t:settings.icon",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "arrow",
          "label": "t:options.arrows"
        },
        {
          "value": "chevron",
          "label": "t:options.chevrons"
        },
        {
          "value": "arrows_large",
          "label": "t:options.arrows_large"
        },
        {
          "value": "chevron_large",
          "label": "t:options.chevron_large"
        },
        {
          "value": "none",
          "label": "t:options.none"
        }
      ],
      "default": "arrow"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "icons_shape",
      "label": "t:settings.icon_background",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "none",
          "label": "t:options.none"
        },
        {
          "value": "circle",
          "label": "t:options.circle"
        },
        {
          "value": "square",
          "label": "t:options.square"
        }
      ],
      "default": "none",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.icons_style != 'none' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.padding"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-start",
      "label": "t:settings.top",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-end",
      "label": "t:settings.bottom",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    }
  ],
  "presets": [
    {
      "name": "t:names.carousel",
      "category": "t:categories.storytelling",
      "settings": {
        "columns": 3,
        "columns_gap": 12,
        "padding-block-start": 48,
        "padding-block-end": 48
      },
      "blocks": {
        "static-header": {
          "type": "group",
          "name": "t:names.header",
          "static": true,
          "settings": {
            "content_direction": "row",
            "vertical_on_mobile": false,
            "horizontal_alignment": "space-between",
            "vertical_alignment": "flex-end",
            "align_baseline": true,
            "horizontal_alignment_flex_direction_column": "flex-start",
            "vertical_alignment_flex_direction_column": "center",
            "gap": 12,
            "width": "fill",
            "custom_width": 100,
            "width_mobile": "fill",
            "custom_width_mobile": 100,
            "height": "fit",
            "custom_height": 100,
            "inherit_color_scheme": true,
            "color_scheme": "",
            "background_media": "none",
            "video_position": "cover",
            "background_image_position": "cover",
            "border": "none",
            "border_width": 1,
            "border_opacity": 100,
            "border_radius": 0,
            "padding-block-start": 0,
            "padding-block-end": 16,
            "padding-inline-start": 0,
            "padding-inline-end": 0
          },
          "blocks": {
            "heading": {
              "type": "text",
              "name": "t:names.header",
              "settings": {
                "text": "t:html_defaults.discover_elevated_design",
                "type_preset": "h3",
                "font": "var(--font-body--family)",
                "wrap": "pretty",
                "width": "fit-content",
                "max_width": "normal",
                "alignment": "left"
              }
            }
          },
          "block_order": ["heading"]
        },
        "static-carousel-content": {
          "type": "_carousel-content",
          "name": "t:names.carousel_content",
          "static": true,
          "settings": {
            "inherit_color_scheme": true,
            "color_scheme": "",
            "position": "top",
            "border": "none",
            "border_width": 1,
            "border_opacity": 100,
            "border_radius": 0,
            "padding-block-start": 0,
            "padding-block-end": 0,
            "padding-inline-start": 0,
            "padding-inline-end": 0,
            "height": "fit"
          },
          "blocks": {
            "card_1": {
              "type": "_card",
              "name": "t:names.card",
              "blocks": {
                "image_1": {
                  "type": "image",
                  "name": "t:names.image"
                },
                "heading_1": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.heading",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.artistry_in_action",
                    "type_preset": "h5"
                  }
                },
                "text_1": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.text",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.bold_style_recognizable"
                  }
                }
              },
              "block_order": ["image_1", "heading_1", "text_1"]
            },
            "card_2": {
              "type": "_card",
              "name": "t:names.card",
              "blocks": {
                "image_2": {
                  "type": "image",
                  "name": "t:names.image"
                },
                "heading_2": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.heading",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.uncompromising_standards",
                    "type_preset": "h5"
                  }
                },
                "text_2": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.text",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.expert_construction_finish"
                  }
                }
              },
              "block_order": ["image_2", "heading_2", "text_2"]
            },
            "card_3": {
              "type": "_card",
              "name": "t:names.card",
              "blocks": {
                "image_3": {
                  "type": "image",
                  "name": "t:names.image"
                },
                "heading_3": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.heading",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.made_to_last",
                    "type_preset": "h5"
                  }
                },
                "text_3": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.text",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.pieces_better_with_time"
                  }
                }
              },
              "block_order": ["image_3", "heading_3", "text_3"]
            },
            "card_4": {
              "type": "_card",
              "name": "t:names.card",
              "blocks": {
                "image_4": {
                  "type": "image",
                  "name": "t:names.image"
                },
                "heading_4": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.heading",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.quality_you_can_feel",
                    "type_preset": "h5"
                  }
                },
                "text_4": {
                  "type": "text",
                  "name": "t:names.text",
                  "settings": {
                    "text": "t:html_defaults.authentic_materials"
                  }
                }
              },
              "block_order": ["image_4", "heading_4", "text_4"]
            }
          },
          "block_order": ["card_1", "card_2", "card_3", "card_4"]
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
{% endschema %}

```

## sections/collection-links.liquid

```liquid


{% liquid
  assign collection_list = section.settings.collection_list

  if collection_list == blank
    assign limit = 4

    for i in (1..4)
      assign collection_list = collection_list | append: ', '
    endfor

    assign collection_list = collection_list | split: ','
  endif

  assign active_collection = collection_list | find: 'id', collection.id | default: collection_list.first
%}

<script
  src="{{ 'collection-links.js' | asset_url }}"
  type="module"
  fetchpriority="low"
></script>

<div class="section-background color-{{ section.settings.color_scheme }}"></div>
<div
  class="section section--{{ section.settings.section_width }} color-{{ section.settings.color_scheme }} spacing-style"
  style="{% render 'spacing-style', settings: section.settings %}"
  data-testid="collection-links-{{ section.id }}"
>
  <collection-links-component
    layout="{{ section.settings.layout }}"
    alignment="{{ section.settings.alignment }}"
    {% if section.settings.image_position == 'left' %}
      reverse
    {% endif %}
  >
    <div
      class="collection-links__container"
      ref="container"
    >
      {% for collection in collection_list limit: limit %}
        {% liquid
          assign current = false

          if collection.id == active_collection.id
            assign current = true
          endif
        %}
        {% content_for 'block',
          type: '_collection-link',
          id: 'link',
          closest.collection: collection,
          index: forloop.index0,
          current: current
        %}
      {% endfor %}
    </div>

    {% case section.settings.layout %}
      {% when 'spotlight' %}
        {% capture slides %}
          {% for collection in collection_list limit: limit %}
          {% liquid
            assign current = false

            if collection.id == active_collection.id
              assign current = true
            endif
          %}

          {% capture slide %}
            {% # theme-check-disable UniqueStaticBlockId %}
            {% content_for 'block',
              type: '_collection-link',
              id: 'link',
              closest.collection: collection,
              index: forloop.index0,
              current: current,
              image_only: true
            %}
            {% # theme-check-enable UniqueStaticBlockId %}
          {% endcapture %}

          {% render 'slideshow-slide', children: slide, index: forloop.index0 %}
        {% endfor %}
      {% endcapture %}

        {% render 'slideshow',
          slides: slides,
          slide_count: collection_list.size,
          class: 'collection-links__images',
          ref: 'slideshow'
        %}
    {% endcase %}
  </collection-links-component>
</div>

{% # theme-check-disable ValidBlockTarget %}
{% stylesheet %}
  collection-links-component {
    --alignment: flex-start;

    display: grid;
    align-items: center;
    grid-gap: var(--gap-3xl);

    &:has([ratio='portrait']) {
      --template-column-ratio: 0.8fr;
    }

    &:has([ratio='square']) {
      --template-column-ratio: 1fr;
    }

    &:has([ratio='landscape']) {
      --template-column-ratio: 1.4fr;
    }

    &[alignment='center'] {
      --alignment: center;

      .text-block {
        text-align: center;
      }
    }

    &[alignment='right'] {
      --alignment: flex-end;

      .text-block {
        text-align: right;
      }
    }

    &[layout='spotlight'] {
      position: relative;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr var(--template-column-ratio);
      grid-template-areas: 'text image';

      @media screen and (min-width: 750px) {
        &[reverse] {
          grid-template-areas: 'image text';
          grid-template-columns: var(--template-column-ratio) 1fr;
        }
      }

      .collection-links__container {
        align-items: var(--alignment);
      }

      @media screen and (max-width: 749px) {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-areas: 'text' 'image';
        grid-gap: var(--gap-2xl);

        .collection-links__container {
          gap: clamp(var(--gap-xs), 1vw, var(--gap-xl)) var(--gap-2xl);
          justify-content: var(--alignment);
        }
      }
    }

    &[layout='text'] {
      grid-gap: 0;
      grid-template-areas: 'text';

      .collection-links__container {
        gap: clamp(var(--gap-xs), 1vw, var(--gap-xl)) var(--gap-2xl);
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: var(--alignment);
      }
    }
  }

  .collection-links__container {
    display: flex;
    gap: var(--gap-md);
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .collection-links__images {
    overflow: hidden;
    grid-area: image;

    @media screen and (max-width: 749px) {
      image-block {
        max-width: 100%;
      }
    }
  }
{% endstylesheet %}

{% schema %}
{
  "name": "t:names.collection_links",
  "disabled_on": {
    "groups": ["header", "footer"]
  },
  "settings": [
    {
      "type": "collection_list",
      "id": "collection_list",
      "label": "t:settings.collection_list"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.layout"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "layout",
      "label": "t:settings.layout",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "spotlight",
          "label": "t:options.spotlight"
        },
        {
          "value": "text",
          "label": "t:options.text"
        }
      ],
      "default": "spotlight"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "section_width",
      "label": "t:settings.width",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "page-width",
          "label": "t:options.page"
        },
        {
          "value": "full-width",
          "label": "t:options.full"
        }
      ],
      "default": "page-width"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "alignment",
      "label": "t:settings.alignment",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "left",
          "label": "t:options.left"
        },
        {
          "value": "center",
          "label": "t:options.center"
        },
        {
          "value": "right",
          "label": "t:options.right"
        }
      ],
      "default": "left"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "image_position",
      "label": "t:settings.image_position",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "left",
          "label": "t:options.left"
        },
        {
          "value": "right",
          "label": "t:options.right"
        }
      ],
      "default": "right",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout == \"spotlight\" }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "color_scheme",
      "id": "color_scheme",
      "label": "t:settings.color_scheme",
      "default": "scheme-1"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.padding"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-start",
      "label": "t:settings.top",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 40
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-end",
      "label": "t:settings.bottom",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 40
    }
  ],
  "presets": [
    {
      "name": "t:names.collection_links_spotlight",
      "category": "t:categories.collections",
      "blocks": {
        "link": {
          "type": "_collection-link",
          "static": true,
          "blocks": {
            "title": {
              "type": "_inline-collection-title",
              "name": "t:names.title",
              "static": true,
              "settings": {
                "font": "var(--font-subheading--family)"
              }
            },
            "image": {
              "type": "_image",
              "static": true,
              "settings": {
                "height": "large",
                "ratio": "square"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "t:names.collection_links_text",
      "category": "t:categories.collections",
      "settings": {
        "layout": "text",
        "alignment": "center"
      },
      "blocks": {
        "link": {
          "type": "_collection-link",
          "static": true,
          "blocks": {
            "title": {
              "type": "_inline-collection-title",
              "name": "t:names.title",
              "static": true,
              "settings": {
                "font": "var(--font-subheading--family)"
              }
            },
            "image": {
              "type": "_image",
              "static": true,
              "settings": {
                "height": "medium"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
{% endschema %}
{% # theme-check-enable ValidBlockTarget %}

```

## sections/collection-list.liquid

```liquid


{% liquid
  if section.settings.collection_list != blank
    assign section_collections = section.settings.collection_list
    assign max_items = section.settings.collection_list.count
  elsif section.settings.layout_type == 'editorial'
    assign max_items = section.settings.max_collections
  elsif section.settings.layout_type == 'bento'
    assign max_items = 4
  elsif section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel'
    assign max_items = section.settings.columns | plus: 2
  elsif section.settings.layout_type == 'grid'
    assign max_items = section.settings.columns
  endif
%}

<div class="section-background color-{{ section.settings.color_scheme }}"></div>

<div
  class="
    section
    section--{{ section.settings.section_width }}
    color-{{ section.settings.color_scheme }}
    section-resource-list
    spacing-style
    gap-style
  "
  style="
    {% render 'spacing-style', settings: section.settings %}
    {% render 'gap-style', value: section.settings.gap %}
  "
  data-testid="collection-list"
>
  <div class="section-resource-list__content">
    {%- content_for 'blocks' -%}
  </div>

  {% if section_collections == null %}
    {% for i in (1..max_items) %}
      {% assign section_collections = section_collections | append: ', ' %}
    {% endfor %}

    {% assign section_collections = section_collections | split: ',' %}
  {% endif %}

  {% capture list_items %}
    {% for collection in section_collections limit: max_items %}
      <div class="resource-list__item">
        {% content_for 'block', type: '_collection-card', id: 'static-collection-card', closest.collection: collection %}
      </div>
      {% unless forloop.last %}
        <!--@list/split-->
      {% endunless %}
    {% endfor %}
  {% endcapture %}

  {% liquid
    # Create an array from the list items to be used for different layout types
    assign list_items_array = list_items | strip | split: '<!--@list/split-->'
  %}

  {% render 'resource-list',
    list_items: list_items,
    list_items_array: list_items_array,
    settings: section.settings,
    carousel_ref: 'collectionList',
    slide_count: max_items,
    content_type: 'collections',
    test_id: 'collections-list-grid'
  %}
</div>

{% schema %}
{
  "name": "t:names.collection_list",
  "class": "ui-test-collection-list",
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "@theme"
    },
    {
      "type": "@app"
    },
    {
      "type": "text"
    },
    {
      "type": "icon"
    },
    {
      "type": "image"
    },
    {
      "type": "button"
    },
    {
      "type": "video"
    },
    {
      "type": "group"
    },
    {
      "type": "spacer"
    },
    {
      "type": "_divider"
    }
  ],
  "disabled_on": {
    "groups": ["header", "footer"]
  },
  "settings": [
    {
      "type": "collection_list",
      "id": "collection_list",
      "label": "t:settings.collection_list"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.cards_layout"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "layout_type",
      "label": "t:settings.layout_type",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "grid",
          "label": "t:options.grid"
        },
        {
          "value": "carousel",
          "label": "t:options.carousel"
        },
        {
          "value": "bento",
          "label": "t:options.bento"
        },
        {
          "value": "editorial",
          "label": "t:options.editorial"
        }
      ],
      "default": "grid"
    },
    {
      "type": "checkbox",
      "id": "carousel_on_mobile",
      "label": "t:settings.carousel_on_mobile",
      "default": false,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type != 'carousel' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "columns",
      "label": "t:settings.columns",
      "min": 1,
      "max": 8,
      "step": 1,
      "default": 4,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'grid' or section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "mobile_columns",
      "label": "t:settings.mobile_columns",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "1",
          "label": "t:options.one_number"
        },
        {
          "value": "2",
          "label": "t:options.two_number"
        }
      ],
      "default": "2",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'grid' and section.settings.carousel_on_mobile == false }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "mobile_card_size",
      "label": "t:settings.mobile_columns",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "60cqw",
          "label": "t:options.one_number"
        },
        {
          "value": "44cqw",
          "label": "t:options.two_number"
        }
      ],
      "default": "60cqw",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel' or section.settings.carousel_on_mobile == true }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "columns_gap",
      "label": "t:settings.horizontal_gap",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 8,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'grid' or section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "bento_gap",
      "label": "t:settings.gap",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 8,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'bento' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "rows_gap",
      "label": "t:settings.vertical_gap",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 8,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'grid'}}"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "max_collections",
      "label": "t:settings.collection_count",
      "min": 1,
      "max": 16,
      "step": 1,
      "default": 4,
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'editorial' }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.carousel_navigation",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel' or section.settings.carousel_on_mobile == true }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "icons_style",
      "label": "t:settings.icon",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "arrow",
          "label": "t:options.arrows"
        },
        {
          "value": "chevron",
          "label": "t:options.chevrons"
        },
        {
          "value": "arrows_large",
          "label": "t:options.arrows_large"
        },
        {
          "value": "chevron_large",
          "label": "t:options.chevron_large"
        },
        {
          "value": "none",
          "label": "t:options.none"
        }
      ],
      "default": "arrow",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel' or section.settings.carousel_on_mobile == true }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "icons_shape",
      "label": "t:settings.icon_background",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "none",
          "label": "t:options.none"
        },
        {
          "value": "circle",
          "label": "t:options.circle"
        },
        {
          "value": "square",
          "label": "t:options.square"
        }
      ],
      "default": "none",
      "visible_if": "{{ section.settings.icons_style != 'none' and section.settings.layout_type == 'carousel' or section.settings.carousel_on_mobile == true }}"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.section_layout"
    },
    {
      "type": "select",
      "id": "section_width",
      "label": "t:settings.width",
      "options": [
        {
          "value": "page-width",
          "label": "t:options.page"
        },
        {
          "value": "full-width",
          "label": "t:options.full"
        }
      ],
      "default": "page-width"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "gap",
      "label": "t:settings.gap",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 12
    },
    {
      "type": "color_scheme",
      "id": "color_scheme",
      "label": "t:settings.color_scheme",
      "default": "scheme-1"
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "t:content.padding"
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-start",
      "label": "t:settings.top",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "range",
      "id": "padding-block-end",
      "label": "t:settings.bottom",
      "min": 0,
      "max": 100,
      "step": 1,
      "unit": "px",
      "default": 0
    }
  ],
  "presets": [
    {
      "name": "t:names.collections_bento",
      "category": "t:categories.collections",
      "settings": {
        "layout_type": "bento",
        "bento_gap": 8,
        "section_width": "page-width",
        "carousel_on_mobile": false,
        "padding-block-start": 24,
        "padding-block-end": 24
      },

}
```
